devMessage:
Thanks for using my mod!
In this devlog you can find the latest news, updates, and some behind-the-scenes information about the development process.
If you have feedback, suggestions, or found a bug, feel free to leave a comment on the mod page (Steam Guides or Nexus Mods).

MaxTotalTiles.label: Max Map Tiles
MaxTotalTiles.description: Maximum map tiles in total. Requires reloading the savegame.

ResearchPointStepCost.label: Research Cost Step
ResearchPointStepCost.description: Research point cost added per map tile step. Already bought tiles count into the next price. Example with step 10: tile 1 = 10, tile 2 = 20, tile 3 = 30.
